asset_name: Crisis icon atlas — Raiders, disease, prophecy, deep storm
shared_properties: Each icon occupies a 32x32px cell so the atlas can support HUD markers and event popups with one asset.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
Silhouettes are designed for quick recognition under grayscale-only presentation.
differences: The atlas includes a raider axe emblem, a disease droplet, a prophecy rune, and a spiral storm glyph.
Each icon uses a distinct outer silhouette so players can differentiate event types without color cues.
Interior detailing stays minimal so the atlas remains readable at small HUD sizes.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Compact atlas loaded once and sampled by event banners, crisis popups, and winter summary screens.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/art_000008.png during UI boot and keep atlas indices for each crisis type in a lookup resource.
runtime_notes: Use atlas indexing so the event system can swap icons without loading multiple small textures.
Keep a 1px clear gutter between icon cells in the authored sheet to avoid bleed on scaling.
Apply icons only in UI layers so they never compete with world-space object silhouettes.

context.usage: Shared icon atlas for crisis warnings, event choices, and winter result summaries.

shape.silhouette: Four compact monochrome glyphs arranged in a single-row atlas with distinct outer silhouettes.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 128x32px with four 32x32px icon cells and 0px outer padding.
Each icon remains identifiable at 24x24px display size without relying on hue differences.
The raider, disease, prophecy, and storm glyphs all have distinct silhouettes.
